title: SpaceX Buys AI Coding Platform Cursor for $60 Billion
subtitle: The move marks a major step for Elon Musk’s company as it competes with AI giants like Anthropic and OpenAI.

summary.en: SpaceX has announced it will acquire the AI coding platform Cursor for $60 billion in an all-stock deal. This acquisition follows SpaceX’s recent entry into the public stock market. By purchasing Cursor, SpaceX aims to improve its own AI technology, known as xAI, to better compete with industry leaders. Experts suggest that gaining access to Cursor’s large user base is a key part of the company's strategy. The deal highlights SpaceX's rapid growth as it recently surpassed Amazon in total market value.
summary.zh: SpaceX 宣布將以六百億美元的全股票交易收購人工智慧程式編寫平台 Cursor。此收購案發生在 SpaceX 近期公開上市之後。透過收購 Cursor，SpaceX 旨在提升其人工智慧技術 xAI，以更好地與產業領導者競爭。專家認為，取得 Cursor 的龐大使用者基礎是該公司策略的關鍵部分。此交易凸顯了 SpaceX 的快速成長，其市值近期已超越亞馬遜。

paragraphs.en: SpaceX, the company led by Elon Musk, has announced plans to buy the AI-powered coding platform Cursor for $60 billion. This major deal comes only days after SpaceX began trading its shares on the public stock market. According to Ars Technica, the transaction will be completed using company stock rather than cash. The deal is expected to finish in the third quarter of this year.
paragraphs.zh: 由伊隆·馬斯克（Elon Musk）領導的太空探索技術公司（SpaceX）宣布，計畫以六百億美元收購人工智慧程式編寫平台 Cursor。這項重大交易是在該公司股票公開上市僅數日後宣布的。根據科技媒體 Ars Technica 報導，此交易將以公司股票而非現金進行支付，預計於今年第三季完成。

paragraphs.en: This acquisition is a significant move for SpaceX, which is also the parent company of xAI. By bringing Cursor into its business, SpaceX hopes to improve its ability to create AI systems that can write computer code. This is a field where companies like Anthropic, the creator of the Claude chatbot, have already found great success. The Guardian Business reports that SpaceX has been looking at Cursor for months, having previously secured an option to either buy the company or form a partnership.
paragraphs.zh: 這項收購對 SpaceX 而言是重要的一步，該公司同時也是人工智慧公司 xAI 的母公司。透過將 Cursor 納入旗下，SpaceX 希望提升其開發人工智慧系統的能力，使其能更有效地編寫電腦程式碼。這是一個如 Claude 聊天機器人開發商 Anthropic 等公司已取得巨大成功的領域。《衛報商業版》（The Guardian Business）報導指出，SpaceX 關注 Cursor 已有數月之久，此前已取得收購該公司或與其建立合作夥伴關係的選擇權。

paragraphs.en: Cursor is a tool built for software developers that uses artificial intelligence to help write code more efficiently. It is based on a popular platform called Visual Studio Code but includes special features that use large language models—AI systems trained on massive amounts of text—to assist with programming tasks. While Cursor has seen significant growth in its number of users, it has faced challenges. Ars Technica noted that the platform was struggling to make a profit and had difficulty growing because it lacked enough computing power to run its advanced models.
paragraphs.zh: Cursor 是一款為軟體開發人員打造的工具，利用人工智慧協助更有效率地編寫程式碼。它基於熱門平台 Visual Studio Code 開發，但加入了特殊功能，利用大型語言模型（即經過海量文字訓練的人工智慧系統）來輔助程式設計任務。儘管 Cursor 的使用者數量顯著成長，但也面臨挑戰。Ars Technica 指出，該平台因缺乏足夠的運算能力來執行其先進模型，在獲利與擴張方面皆遭遇困難。

paragraphs.en: SpaceX is now in a position to solve these problems. As a owner of large data centers, SpaceX can provide the computing power that Cursor needs to expand. According to The Guardian Business, analysts believe that owning a tool already trusted by over one million professional developers is a smart way for SpaceX to grow its AI business. By integrating Cursor’s technology and data, SpaceX aims to make its own AI model, Grok, more useful for business customers who need to write and manage code.
paragraphs.zh: SpaceX 現在有能力解決這些問題。身為大型資料中心的擁有者，SpaceX 能提供 Cursor 擴張所需的運算能力。根據《衛報商業版》報導，分析師認為，收購一個已獲超過一百萬名專業開發人員信賴的工具，是 SpaceX 發展人工智慧業務的明智之舉。透過整合 Cursor 的技術與資料，SpaceX 旨在使其人工智慧模型 Grok 對於需要編寫與管理程式碼的企業客戶更具實用性。

paragraphs.en: This deal arrives at a time of massive growth for SpaceX. The company recently passed Amazon to become the world’s fifth most valuable company. The Guardian Business reports that after its stock market debut, SpaceX’s valuation reached as high as $2.97 trillion. This rapid rise in value has significantly increased the personal wealth of Elon Musk. However, the company still faces financial challenges, as it reported a loss of $4.9 billion in 2025 despite high revenues.
paragraphs.zh: 這項交易正值 SpaceX 快速成長之際。該公司近期超越亞馬遜（Amazon），成為全球市值第五高的企業。《衛報商業版》報導，在股票上市後，SpaceX 的市值一度達到二點九七兆美元。市值的快速攀升顯著增加了馬斯克的個人財富。然而，該公司仍面臨財務挑戰，儘管營收高昂，二〇二五年仍報告虧損四十九億美元。

paragraphs.en: Industry experts have mixed views on the impact of this purchase. Harrison Rolfes, an analyst at PitchBook, told The Guardian Business that while the deal is a positive step, it may not be enough to immediately close the gap between xAI and its biggest rivals, OpenAI and Anthropic. However, Gil Luria from the investment firm DA Davidson noted that the acquisition will certainly improve SpaceX’s position in the competitive race to build the best AI models. He explained that having a strong coding component is essential for attracting enterprise customers—large companies that pay for software services.
paragraphs.zh: 產業專家對此收購案的影響看法不一。PitchBook 的分析師哈里森·羅爾夫斯（Harrison Rolfes）向《衛報商業版》表示，雖然這項交易是正面的一步，但可能不足以立即縮小 xAI 與其最大競爭對手 OpenAI 及 Anthropic 之間的差距。不過，投資公司 DA Davidson 的吉爾·盧里亞（Gil Luria）指出，此次收購肯定會提升 SpaceX 在人工智慧模型競賽中的地位。他解釋說，擁有強大的程式編寫組件對於吸引企業客戶（即付費購買軟體服務的大型公司）至關重要。

paragraphs.en: For now, the future of the partnership looks focused on growth. Earlier this year, xAI and the team behind Cursor began working together to train new models, including a tool called Grok Build. This early cooperation suggested that a larger deal was likely. As the companies move forward, the focus will be on whether this $60 billion investment can help SpaceX turn its AI ambitions into a profitable part of its broader business, which already includes rocket launches and the Starlink satellite internet service.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，雙方的合作前景聚焦於成長。今年稍早，xAI 與 Cursor 的團隊開始合作訓練新模型，其中包括名為 Grok Build 的工具。這種早期的合作顯示大規模交易極有可能發生。隨著兩家公司持續推進，焦點將在於這筆六百億美元的投資，能否協助 SpaceX 將其人工智慧雄心轉化為更廣泛業務中獲利的一部分，該業務目前已涵蓋火箭發射與星鏈（Starlink）衛星網路服務。

keyTerms.definitionEn: Buying and selling shares on the stock market.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 在股市中進行股票買賣交易。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（貿易），這裡作動詞用，指公司股票上市流通。文中：This major deal comes only days after SpaceX began trading its shares on the public stock market.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A particular area of activity or study.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（田野），這裡指專業領域。文中：This is a field where companies like Anthropic, the creator of the Claude chatbot, have already found great success.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The first public appearance of something.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（首次演出），這裡作名詞用，指公司股票首次公開發行。文中：The Guardian Business reports that after its stock market debut, SpaceX’s valuation reached as high as $2.97 trillion.

keyTerms.definitionEn: A part or element of a larger whole.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見於科技或機械領域，這裡指業務中的核心組成部分。文中：He explained that having a strong coding component is essential for attracting enterprise customers—large companies that pay for software services.

sources.name: Ars Technica
sources.title: SpaceX to acquire AI coding platform Cursor for $60 billion

sources.name: The Guardian Business
sources.title: SpaceX overtakes Amazon as world’s fifth most valuable company

quiz.question: What is the primary method SpaceX will use to complete the purchase of Cursor?

options.A: A combination of cash and company debt
options.C: A direct cash payment from its recent profits
options.D: A partnership agreement without an ownership transfer

quiz.explanationZh: 根據文章第一段，文中明確提到「the transaction will be completed using company stock rather than cash」。選項 A 錯誤，因為文中並未提及債務；選項 C 與文中「rather than cash」的敘述直接衝突；選項 D 錯誤，因為這是一項收購（acquisition）而非單純的合作。

quiz.question: Why did Cursor struggle to grow before the acquisition by SpaceX?

options.A: It lacked interest from professional software developers
options.B: It was unable to compete with the features of Visual Studio Code
options.C: It did not have the necessary infrastructure to support its AI models
options.D: It was legally blocked from forming partnerships with large AI firms

quiz.explanationZh: 根據第三段與第四段的推論，第三段提到 Cursor 因為「lacked enough computing power」而難以成長，而第四段提到 SpaceX 作為「owner of large data centers」可以提供這些運算能力。選項 A 與文中提到其擁有一百萬開發者用戶的事實不符；選項 B 錯誤，因為 Cursor 本身就是基於 Visual Studio Code 開發的；選項 D 在文中並無依據。

quiz.question: In the sixth paragraph, what does the word 'gap' mean in the context of the AI industry?

options.A: The difference in performance or market position between companies
options.B: A physical space between two different software platforms
options.C: A temporary pause in the development of new AI models
options.D: The financial loss reported by a company during a specific period

quiz.explanationZh: 在第六段中，分析師提到這筆交易可能不足以縮小 xAI 與 OpenAI、Anthropic 之間的「gap」。這裡的 gap 指的是競爭對手之間的技術實力或市場地位差距。選項 B 是字面意義的誤用；選項 C 不符合語境，因為競爭仍在持續；選項 D 指的是財務虧損，與文中討論的市場競爭地位不同。

quiz.question: What is the central purpose of SpaceX acquiring the coding platform Cursor?

options.A: To shift the company's main focus away from rocket launches and satellites
options.B: To increase the personal wealth of Elon Musk through stock market manipulation
options.C: To help OpenAI and Anthropic develop better coding tools for the public
options.D: To leverage Cursor's technology to strengthen its own AI business and appeal to enterprise clients

quiz.explanationZh: 文章第四段與第六段總結了收購的核心動機：SpaceX 透過整合 Cursor 的技術與數據，旨在提升其 AI 模型 Grok 的功能，並藉此吸引需要程式編寫工具的企業客戶（enterprise customers）。選項 A 錯誤，因為文中提到 AI 只是其業務的一部分；選項 B 並非收購的主要商業目的；選項 C 錯誤，因為 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 是競爭對手，而非合作對象。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
